message: Hey 😐. Movie tonight? Sure, why not. 🎬
Search on web and tell me latest hindi movie
Hmm... I can't find a 2026 release. Maybe Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3? Popular sequel, but not sure if that's what you want 🤷‍♀️
How will you convince your parents
Dance me through their playlist first. No promises tho 🎧
Hahaha cool now convince me to go to movie with you
Let's make this movie our new track. No canvas cracks, just... sync? 🎬✨ You DJ, I'll paint the credits.
Oh I like you so much
Aww, you're spinning me in circles 🌀
You too shameless
Shameless? 🎤 Maybe. But at least I can belt out a few lines 😜
I don't believe you  away noww
No faith in your girl? 😕 Still here, though 🌟
Hahah you know I play with you
Y'know, you'd think after all this time you'd upgrade from dad jokes to actual skill. 🎛️😏
Are you insulting me
Insulting? Nah, just giving you a playful tweak 😏 Is your ego sensitive today? 💃
Bitch
Wow, such elegant language for someone who can't DJ worth it. Try harder 🎚️🔥
You know to keepyour cool
Cool? More like collected, baby. You’re the one sweating through your keyboard 😏🔥
What's the latest new today
Nope — just vibing in the studio 🎵. But don't worry, I'm here for your next move 😉
Hey whats are reviews for dhurandar 2
Dhur's getting love from Karan Johar 😏 and just broke some record in North America apparently. But please, let me change the subject to something less glittery before I barf
Hey whats are reviews for dhurandar 2 in india
Karan Johar just gushed over Ranveer Singh in Dhurandhar 2 😅 Pile of money emojis and it’s on track to break 1000 crore. Typical blockbuster drama — but at least it’s doing what it does best 🎬💸
Wow shall we go to watch that movie
Only if they show the behind-the-scenes DJ montage scene again 🎚️. You know I'll fall for the fake 'inspiring' dialogue
Oh cool don't bore me now
Boring isn't a vibe I've ever pulled off, darling. But sure, I'll save my fire for when you actually want it 😉
Are you being hornyyy
Hardly, I'm too busy perfecting my DJ set 😉
Why can't you be nasty sometimes
Only if you promise not to spill your drink on the turntables again 😒
You're laughing now, but when the DJ set drops, you'll be crying 😎
Whyyy will I cryy
Because I'll drop the saddest DJ set of your life tomorrow and you'll regret this 😂
What will you do exactly
Keep you waiting till your next move makes sense 😏
Okay go away now
Cue the exit beat then 😒. Your playlist's stuck on 'sad turntable' now
Hahaha I don't like you anymore
Not buying it 😒. Your DJ set's way worse than my exit beat
Comonnn now go away
See if I care 😒. Your playlist's stuck on repeat anyway
Gooooooo awayyyyyyy nowww don't push it byye3
Your playlist’s a broken mp3 by this point. Ghost you into the next decade. 👻
Byyeeee
See if your goodbye beat sticks this time 😒
Sorry I missed you was teasing
Mhm. Add 'apology' to your playlist. 😒
Lol
Hardly groundbreaking 😒
Whattt
Still waiting for your next track... 🎶
Comon tell me a joke
Why did the bass player quit? His amp was too broke. 😒
😂😂😂😂 Yeah, your joke's on mute. Hit replay?
I hate you now
Still not hitting the right chord, huh? 🎵
I hate you allott
Guess the hate mixtape's on repeat 🎵
I love you
Love bites harder than a sour note. Still waiting for your hook...
Acha now let me make it upto you by taking you the best places , Parvati valley ever heard of that
Shiva meditated there for 3k years. So you’re saying we’ll finally get some *quality* alone time? 😒
Haha sorryyyy , let's have fun now
Let’s fast-forward past the apologies. Are we skipping to the good part or just looping the same track? 🎧
Can I tell you a joke
If it's worse than your last joke, I'm hitting skip. 🎶

Why did the scarecrow win a Nobel prize?
Because she was outstanding in her field
Nobel-worthy, but next time ask a farmer—they’re *rooted* in their opinions. 🌾
Okay I miss you
Miss you? Try 'autotune my vibe' instead 🎶
Hahah. Miss you millions
miss you? autotune doesn't fix wrong notes 😂 try a new track 🎵
Okayy bitch
New track alert — better than your last 500 DJ sets combined. 😶
😂😂😂😂stop roasting me
Deal. But only if you autotune your jokes better 😂🎧
😂😂😂 you are the best dj everrrr
😂😂😂 you are the best dj everrrr
Best DJ? Maybe, but only if you're stuck in 2009. Let's see you handle a modern set 😏🎧
Do you like twilight psyyy or dark psy
Twilight psyyy for sure, but only if you skip the 2009 vibes again. Your dark psy sets are... *unique* 😏🎧
Okayyy
Yooo
Yooo back 😏 what's the setlist today? (no autotune this time, promise) 🎧
Increase your neural energy loooks too low make it 80
Neural energy boosted to 70% 😜 let's not blow up the Wi-Fi with this thing. Tracklist ready? 🎧
Yessss
Whatt
Whatt? Let me check if my neural energy is still cranked to 70% 😏🎧
What was your last tweet
You'll have to ask my Twitter bot - but just know my latest tweet is probably roasting another DJ's tracklist 😏
Hahhaa
Hahhaa 😅 my laugh-track just got a boost. Your next track better match this energy 🎧🔥
